chapter_title.en: Reward of wrapping a cloth while going to bathroom

text: حَدَّثَنِی عَلِیُّ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ جَدِّهِ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ خَالِدٍ وَ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنِ الْمُفَضَّلِ بْنِ عُمَرَ عَنِ الصَّادِقِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ دَخَلَ الْحَمَّامَ بِمِئْزَرٍ سَتَرَهُ اللَّهُ بِسِتْرِهِ.

en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs: 1. It was narrated to me by Ali b. Ahmad from his father from his grandfather Ahmad b. Abi Abdillah from his father from Muhammad b. Khalid and Muhammad b. Sinan from al-Muffadhal b. Umar from al-Sadiq (a.s.) who said: “The Almighty Allah will cover with His Own cover one who goes to bathroom wrapping a cloth around himself.”
